summary: Simulation targeting Oakstream platform with specific configuration
evidence: The simulation targeted the Oakstream platform with the configuration '1_socket_ucc-bmc-oobmsm-pfrprot-s3m' and using the fmod 'pfrprot+oobmsm+s3m+bmc'.

summary: Error code 0014.D.57 encountered during BIOS configuration
